subcodes.first_line: The evidences of God, glorified be His majesty, are manifest and visible from every direction, and the effulgences of the lights of His Revelation shine forth from all else but Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آثار حق جل جلاله از هر جهتی ظاهر و هویدا و تجلیات انوار ظهورش از ما سوایش
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @presence of; reunion with God, @spiritual transformation
